016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.service;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.InsufficientMoneyException;
021import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.SigningRequest;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionInputData;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionOutputData;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionSigner;
026
027import java.io.IOException;
028import java.util.List;
029import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
030
031/**
032 * A wallet-level service that can complete and sign transactions.
033 */
034public interface SignTransactionService extends TransactionSigner {
035
036    /**
037     * Create and sign a transaction to send coins to the specified address. Implements the transaction-building
038     * and signing portion of {@code sendtoaddress} RPC.
039     * @param toAddress destination address
040     * @param amount amount to send
041     * @return a future signed transaction
042     */
043    CompletableFuture<Transaction> signSendToAddress(Address toAddress, Coin amount) throws IOException, InsufficientMoneyException;
044
045    /**
046     * Create a signing request, given a list of inputs, a list of outputs and a change address. Calculates
047     * the fee, adds a change output, and returns a completed signing request.
048     * @param inputUtxos list of available UTXOs
049     * @param outputs Outputs to send to
050     * @param changeAddress address that will receive change
051     * @return a completed transaction signing request
052     */
053    SigningRequest createBitcoinSigningRequest(List<TransactionInputData> inputUtxos, List<TransactionOutputData> outputs, Address changeAddress) throws InsufficientMoneyException;
054}
